row.name: Thassa's Oracle
row.oracle_text: When Thassa's Oracle enters, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is your devotion to blue. Put up to one of them on top of your library and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. If X is greater than or equal to the number of cards in your library, you win the game. (Each {U} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to blue.)

effects.text: look at the top X cards of your library, where X is your devotion to blue
Put up to one of them on top of your library and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order

condition.text: If X is greater than or equal to the number of cards in your library

abilities.text: When Thassa's Oracle enters, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is your devotion to blue. Put up to one of them on top of your library and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. If X is greater than or equal to the number of cards in your library, you win the game.

wincon.detail: wins on resolution when library is empty (or devotion covers it)
